title: Weather on Monday: Fine and cool with clear skies
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - After a cold,...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - After a cold, wet weekend for most parts of the country, the South African Weather Service has only issued one warning for adverse weather conditions.

Yellow level 2 warning for damaging waves resulting in disruptions of small harbours and ports, and difficulty in navigation as well as possible storm surge are expected between Lambert's Bay and Port Edward.


> Regional weather forecast:


Western CapeMorning fog patches in places in the south, otherwise partly cloudy and cool. The wind along the coast will be moderate easterly to south- Easterly. The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapeFine and cool. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate south-westerly, becoming north-easterly in the afternoon.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeFine and cool to cold. The wind along the coast will be moderate south-westerly, becoming lightand variable by late morning, but moderate north-easterly by late afternoon.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
